title: More Elytras!
description: This mod adds many new Elytras that have their unique abilities.It's like Iron Elytras mod.
body:
This mod adds many new Elytras that have unique abilities and flying speeds .
 
New Elytras:
- Iron Elytra
- Golden Elytra
- Diamond Elytra
- Emerald Elytra
- Netherite Elytra
- TNT Elytra

Elytras are craftable in the Elytra Table. Simple Elytras made from ores have recipes like that: 

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab6ba43752c37c00ec6d91126ab99260852376fc.gif)

Elytras with unique abilities include Nether Star as one component  in their recipes.The TNT Elytra's recipe looks like this:

![TNT Elytra's Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e37e9d8d53ef83a23d74de3aaa72e40ad60c9388.png)

*Netherite Elytra's recipe is the same as that of other netherite items*

Elytra Table Recipe:
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94e7baeb233e6a0de228a0665a078b40a9b0c94c.webp)
